params.StackDescription: REP You take_{p:You} takes & gain_gains & draw_draws & create_creates & . Activate only as a sorcery._.
params.SpellDescription: You take the initiative, gain 3 life, draw a card, and create a Treasure token. Activate only as a sorcery. (A Treasure token is an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")
